zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bassett於1436年10月14日出生在英國斯塔福爾布洛爾時，他的父親William Basset30歲，母親Alice Moton25歲。他於1450年與Joan Byron在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年11月12日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾布洛爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bassett was born on 14 October 1436, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, his father, William Basset, was 30 and his mother, Alice Moton, was 25. He married Joan Byron in 1450, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 November 1498, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Blore, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bassett est né le 14 octobre 1436, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Basset, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Moton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Byron en 1450, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1498, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bassett am 14. Oktober 1436 in Blore, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Basset 30 und seine Mutter Alice Moton 25. Er hat 1450 in Staffordshire, England Joan Byron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. November 1498 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Blore, Staffordshire, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: William Bassett(이)가 1436년 10월 14일 영국 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Basset(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Moton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1450년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Joan Byron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 11월 12일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 블로어에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Byron em 1450, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bassett родился 14 октября 1436 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Basset было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Moton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Byron в 1450 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 ноября 1498 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия.
